text.title: IaC Module Design Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `IaC Module Design Patterns` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: inputs-design
step.action: Trim inputs to minimal surface; mark advanced ones optional with defaults.

step.name: outputs-design
step.action: Type and document each output; choose stable names.

step.name: examples
step.action: Write at least one examples/<name>/main.tf; ensure terraform validate passes.

step.name: version-and-publish
step.action: Tag SemVer; publish to registry; announce.
